name: Is Apple Prepared for a Succession?
description: MacNewsWorld analysis of Apple's succession planning after Steve Jobs's pancreatic cancer disclosure and 30-day medical leave (August 2004). Peter Kastner, executive vice president at Aberdeen Group, plays down near-term governance risk — the head of sales is running the company during back-to-school season — but the article broadly raises concern about Apple's lack of disclosed succession plan.

creator.name: Blane Warrene (reporter, MacNewsWorld); Peter Kastner, Chad Mader (quoted sources)
